Source   Edit  

Generic Simultaneous Conflict Resolver

Reusable conflict resolution framework for any competitive fleet order type. Uses fleet strength + deterministic random tiebreaker.

Imports

simultaneous_types, ../../common/types/core

Procs

proc blockadeStrength(intent: BlockadeIntent): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Extract blockade strength from blockade intent Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}
Extract espionage strength from espionage intent Source   Edit   
proc planetaryCombatStrength(intent: PlanetaryCombatIntent): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Extract attack strength from planetary combat intent Source   Edit   
proc resolveConflictByStrength[IntentType](intents: seq[IntentType];
    strengthGetter: proc (intent: IntentType): int; tiebreakerSeed: int64;
    rng: var Rand): IntentType

Generic conflict resolver using strength + deterministic random tiebreaker

intents: All competing intents for the same target strengthGetter: Function to extract strength from intent tiebreakerSeed: Seed for deterministic random selection (turn + targetId hash) rng: Random number generator (not used if no ties)

Returns: The winning intent

Source   Edit   
proc tiebreakerSeed(turn: int; targetId: SystemId): int64 {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Generate deterministic tiebreaker seed from turn and target Source   Edit
